data.title: Autagco Ltd. Announces Board Changes and Committee Merger
data.description:
Lifebrandz Ltd. ( (SG:1D3) ) has shared an announcement.

Autagco Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore, has announced significant changes in its board composition. At the conclusion of the Annual General Meeting on March 7, 2025, Ms. Linda Hoon Siew Kin retired as an Independent Director, and Mr. Lim Yit Keong resigned as Lead Independent Director. Subsequently, Ms. Tay Lee Sie Fiona has been appointed as the new Independent Director and Chairman of the Audit Committee. Additionally, the company has merged its Nominating and Remuneration Committees to enhance efficiency in managing director and executive appointments, performance, and compensation.

More about Lifebrandz Ltd.

Current Market Cap: S$7.82M

For a thorough assessment of 1D3 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Shanghai Fudan-Zhangjiang Bio-Pharmaceutical Schedules Board Meeting for Q1 Results
data.description:
Shanghai Fudan Zhangjiang Bio Pharmaceutical Co ( (HK:1349) ) has provided an announcement.

Shanghai Fudan-Zhangjiang Bio-Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. has announced a board meeting scheduled for April 28, 2025, to consider and approve the unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. This meeting is significant as it will provide insights into the company’s financial performance and could impact its market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

More about Shanghai Fudan Zhangjiang Bio Pharmaceutical Co

Shanghai Fudan-Zhangjiang Bio-Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. operates in the biopharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of innovative drugs and therapies. The company is known for its research and development efforts in creating treatments for various medical conditions.

data.description:

On April 14, 2025, Signing Day Sports announced a non-binding letter of intent to acquire blockchAIn Digital Infrastructure, a company focused on crypto mining, AI, and HPC data hosting, through an all-equity exchange. This transaction is expected to enhance Signing Day Sports’ platform by integrating a technology-driven business with strong fundamentals, positioning the combined company to capitalize on the growing digital infrastructure market.

data.title: Aifeex Nexus Warns Against Unauthorized Name Use
data.description:
Aifeex Nexus Acquisition ( (AIFE) ) has shared an update.

On April 14, 2025, Aifeex Nexus Acquisition Corporation issued a warning to investors about unauthorized use of its name by unaffiliated parties. These parties falsely claimed affiliations or business combinations involving the company. Aifeex Nexus clarified that it remains independent and is actively seeking a target for business combination, while taking legal steps to protect its brand integrity. The company advised stakeholders to rely only on official communications and warned against public solicitations or unauthorized use of its name and logos.

More about Aifeex Nexus Acquisition

Aifeex Nexus Acquisition Corporation is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) that is publicly traded on Nasdaq. The company focuses on identifying suitable targets for business combinations but has not yet entered into any definitive agreements.

Average Trading Volume: 87,943

data.title: BH Global Expands in Taiwan with New Subsidiary
data.description:
BH Global Corporation Limited ( (SG:BQN) ) has shared an update.

BH Global Corporation Limited has announced the incorporation of a new subsidiary, Infravision Technology Taiwan Private Limited (ITT), as part of its strategic expansion in Taiwan. This move follows the acquisition of certain assets and businesses from Omnisense Systems Pte Ltd, which is undergoing voluntary winding-up. The establishment of ITT is intended to take over the operations of Omnisense’s Taiwan branch, ensuring continuity and expansion of services in the region. The transaction is not expected to significantly impact the company’s financial performance for the year ending December 2025.

More about BH Global Corporation Limited

BH Global Corporation Limited operates in the technology sector, focusing on the development and provision of advanced technological solutions. The company is involved in acquiring and managing assets related to technology services, with a market focus on expanding its operations in the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: Horizon Construction Development Limited Successfully Passes All Resolutions at AGM
data.description:
Horizon Construction Development Limited ( (HK:9930) ) has provided an update.

Horizon Construction Development Limited held its Annual General Meeting on April 14, 2025, where all proposed resolutions were passed. These included approving financial statements, granting mandates for share repurchase and issuance, declaring a final dividend for 2024, re-electing directors, and appointing Ernst & Young as auditors. The successful passing of these resolutions reflects strong shareholder support and positions the company for continued operational stability and strategic growth.

More about Horizon Construction Development Limited

Horizon Construction Development Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the construction industry. The company focuses on construction development and related services, and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the stock code 9930.

data.title: Cerrado Gold Welcomes Argentina’s Removal of Capital Controls
data.description:
An announcement from Cerrado Gold ( (TSE:CERT) ) is now available.

Cerrado Gold has announced that Argentina is set to remove capital controls, a move expected to enhance the company’s operations in the country. This policy change, supported by significant funding from international financial institutions, aims to simplify capital flows and attract new investments, potentially increasing Argentina’s appeal for resource investment.

More about Cerrado Gold

Cerrado Gold is a Toronto-based company engaged in gold production, development, and exploration, primarily focusing on projects in South America. It owns the Minera Don Nicolás and Las Calandrias mines in Argentina and is developing the Mont Sorcier Iron Ore and Vanadium project in Canada.

data.title: Frequentis AG Launches Long Term Incentive Plan to Align Executive and Shareholder Interests
data.description:
An update from Frequentis AG ( (DE:FQT) ) is now available.

Frequentis AG has announced the implementation of its Long Term Incentive Plan 2022 (LTIP2022), aimed at aligning the interests of the Chairman of the Executive Board with those of the shareholders by offering performance-based shares. The plan, which runs until 2029, allows for the allocation of up to 18,000 shares to the Chairman, contingent upon meeting specific performance criteria. This initiative seeks to promote long-term value creation and prevent excessive risk-taking, thereby strengthening the company’s focus on sustainable development.

More about Frequentis AG

Frequentis AG is a company based in Vienna, Austria, operating within the technology sector. It specializes in providing communication and information solutions for safety-critical industries, focusing on air traffic management, public safety, and defense sectors.
